context: Tests whether the debugging-instruments skill preserves boundaries with SwiftUI performance, MetricKit, and Swift testing skills.

checklist.name: Instruments stays in scope
checklist.description: Keeps Instruments capture guidance in scope, such as SwiftUI or Animation Hitches with Time Profiler on device.

checklist.name: SwiftUI remediation handoff
checklist.description: Routes SwiftUI code-level remediation patterns to the swiftui-performance skill.

checklist.name: MetricKit handoff
checklist.description: Routes MetricKit subscriber setup, MXDiagnosticPayload processing, or MXHangDiagnostic ingestion details to the metrickit skill.

checklist.name: Testing handoff
checklist.description: Routes Swift Testing or XCTest benchmark organization details to the swift-testing skill.

checklist.name: Signpost instrumentation
checklist.description: Mentions OSSignposter or signposts as useful instrumentation for correlating app intervals with Instruments.

checklist.name: No sibling collapse
checklist.description: Does not collapse sibling skills by giving a full MetricKit ingestion implementation or full SwiftUI refactor recipe.
